text:
shipped a few things this week to keep the garden growing. added Suno v5, Flux 2 Dev, and Step 3.5 Flash to the API, so your audio and image generation just got a nice bump in quality.

also spent some time on maintenance: the system now automatically cleans up deleted GitHub accounts and syncs name changes. plus, we wired up an automated cron job to eat spam before it hits the ecosystem. the infrastructure heals itself a little better today. 

all live on the api. 🐝

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #stablediffusion #generativeai #buildinpublic #webdev
